researchResults.title: RLWRLD releases RLDX-1, a dexterity-first foundation model for robot hands
researchResults.description:
RLWRLD said with RLDX-1, it aimed to include things like context memorization or force sensing, which existing models often lack.

The post RLWRLD releases RLDX-1, a dexterity-first foundation model for robot hands appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Cognex releases fully integrated AI-powered vision system for robotics
researchResults.description:
The system combines Cognex-developed edge AI, advanced AI, and rule-based vision tools with a high-performance embedded compute.

The post Cognex releases fully integrated AI-powered vision system for robotics appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Why traditional robotics data collection is obsolete and what replaces it
researchResults.description:
Eric Chan discusses Rhoda AI's innovative approach to robotics using video data for scalable, efficient learning.

The post Why traditional robotics data collection is obsolete and what replaces it appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Riding an AI rally, Robinhood preps second retail venture IPO
researchResults.description: Robinhood files confidentially for its second venture fund, this time targeting growth and early-stage startups.

researchResults.title: Learn how to successfully design hospital logistics robots at the Robotics Summit
researchResults.description:
Experts from Rovex Technologies, SKA Robotics, and ST Engineering Aethon will discuss design considerations for hospital robotics.

The post Learn how to successfully design hospital logistics robots at the Robotics Summit appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Thinking Machines wants to build an AI that actually listens while it talks
researchResults.description: Right now, every AI model you've ever used works the same way. You talk, it listens. It responds, you listen. Thinking Machines is trying to change that by building a model that processes your input and generates a response at the same time, so it's more like a phone call than a text chain.

researchResults.title: GM just laid off hundreds of IT workers to hire those with stronger AI skills
researchResults.description: Some of the positions focus on AI-native development, data engineering and analytics, cloud-based engineering, and agent and model development as well as prompt engineering and new AI workflows.

researchResults.title: Digg tries again, this time as an AI news aggregator
researchResults.description: In an email to beta testers, the company said the site's goal is to "track the most influential voices in a space" and to surface the news that's actually worth "paying attention to."

researchResults.title: There aren’t enough rockets for space data centers — Cowboy Space raised $275M to build them
researchResults.description: The apparently insatiable demand for AI compute has data center entrepreneurs looking to the stars. There's a key problem: There aren't enough rockets to put data centers in orbit around Earth, and they're too expensive.

researchResults.title: How to engineer robot tracks and 7th axis systems for real-world environments
researchResults.description:
Experts from Güdel will focus on how harsh and dirty environments impact robot tracks and long-axis linear motion systems.

The post How to engineer robot tracks and 7th axis systems for real-world environments appeared first on The Robot Report.
